build.template: Build the NeoDOS OS: compile bootloader + kernel and create the FAT32 disk image. Run from the neodos/ directory.
build.description: Build bootloader, kernel, and disk image

run.template: Launch NeoDOS in QEMU with OVMF UEFI firmware, serial output, and GDB server on :1234. Run from neodos/ after building.

debug.template: Connect GDB to a running QEMU instance (port :1234) with kernel symbols loaded. Run from neodos/ using gdb -x .gdbinit

github.template: Review uncommitted changes in the repo (master branch). Check that docs/ files (AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, KERNEL.md, IMPROVEMENTS.md, CHANGELOG.md, NEM_SPEC.md, etc.) are up to date with any new features or changes. Build kernel + user binaries, then run auto_test.py. Commit and push to GitHub with descriptive message.
